ordinary_path.follow_on_policy: materialization is reached from the storyline handoff or explicit materialize-book selection; chapter-production-planning owns storyline admission and begins the focused sequence chapter-production-planning -> chapter-materialization -> source-style-integrity-review -> publication-proof-handoff.

explicit_variants.entry_policy: requires_storyline_architecture_handoff_or_explicit_materialize_book_selection; chapter-production-planning performs admission and route-back before focused materialization stages continue, and provider completion cannot claim book quality, proof readiness, final export, or owner acceptance.
